headline: Paychex Wins Two 2026 Lighthouse Tech Awards
summary: ROCHESTER, N.Y., March 09, 2026--Paychex, Inc. (Nasdaq: PAYX), an industry-leading human capital management (HCM) company, today announced that the company has received industry recognition from Lighthouse Research & Advisory for its Paychex Flex® and Paycor® HCM platforms. Paychex Flex earned a Lighthouse Tech Award for Best Small Business-focused Solution and Paycor for Best Midsize Business-focused Solution, both within the Core HR/Workforce category.

headline: Paychex Stock: Is PAYX Underperforming the Technology Sector?
summary: Paychex has significantly underperformed the Technology sector over the past year, and analysts are cautious about the stock’s prospects.

headline: CrowdStrike and 11 Other Stocks That Have Gained Every Day of the Iran War
summary: The conflict in the Middle East has turned the market on its head, with investors piling back into beaten-down software stocks.

headline: Switching jobs meant big raises just a few years ago—here’s what the pay bump looks like now
summary: Pay increases for workers who switch jobs are now roughly a third of what they were at the peak of the pandemic hiring boom, a new study shows.
